We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 1.17s, d = 3.76m:
t^2 = 1.17 * 1.17:
1.17 * 0.07 = 0.0819
1.17 * 0.10 = 0.1170
1.17 * 1.00 = 1.1700
0.0819 + 0.1170 = 0.1989
0.1989 + 1.1700 = 1.3689
k = 3.76 / 1.17^2 = 3.76 / 1.3689 = 3.760 / 1.368
= 0 + 1 * 3760 / 1368
= 1 + 1 * 2392 / 1368
= 2 + 1 * 1024 / 1368
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 10240 / 1368
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 8872 / 1368
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 7504 / 1368
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 6136 / 1368
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 4768 / 1368
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 3400 / 1368
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 2032 / 1368
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 664 / 1368
= 2.70 + 0.01 * 6640 / 1368
= 2.71 + 0.01 * 5272 / 1368
= 2.72 + 0.01 * 3904 / 1368
= 2.73 + 0.01 * 2536 / 1368
= 2.74 + 0.01 * 1168 / 1368
= 2.740 + 0.001 * 11680 / 1368
= 2.741 + 0.001 * 10312 / 1368
= 2.742 + 0.001 * 8944 / 1368
= 2.743 + 0.001 * 7576 / 1368
= 2.744 + 0.001 * 6208 / 1368
= 2.745 + 0.001 * 4840 / 1368
= 2.746 + 0.001 * 3472 / 1368
= 2.747 + 0.001 * 2104 / 1368
= 2.748 + 0.001 * 736 / 1368
= 2.748

t = 2.45s, d = 16.5m:
t^2 = 2.45 * 2.45:
2.45 * 0.05 = 0.1225
2.45 * 0.40 = 0.9800
2.45 * 2.00 = 4.9000
0.1225 + 0.9800 = 1.1025
1.1025 + 4.9000 = 6.0025
k = 16.5 / 2.45^2 = 16.5 / 6.0025 = 16.500 / 6.002
= 0 + 1 * 16500 / 6002
= 1 + 1 * 10498 / 6002
= 2 + 1 * 4496 / 6002
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 44960 / 6002
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 38958 / 6002
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 32956 / 6002
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 26954 / 6002
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 20952 / 6002
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 14950 / 6002
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 8948 / 6002
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 2946 / 6002
= 2.70 + 0.01 * 29460 / 6002
= 2.71 + 0.01 * 23458 / 6002
= 2.72 + 0.01 * 17456 / 6002
= 2.73 + 0.01 * 11454 / 6002
= 2.74 + 0.01 * 5452 / 6002
= 2.740 + 0.001 * 54520 / 6002
= 2.741 + 0.001 * 48518 / 6002
= 2.742 + 0.001 * 42516 / 6002
= 2.743 + 0.001 * 36514 / 6002
= 2.744 + 0.001 * 30512 / 6002
= 2.745 + 0.001 * 24510 / 6002
= 2.746 + 0.001 * 18508 / 6002
= 2.747 + 0.001 * 12506 / 6002
= 2.748 + 0.001 * 6504 / 6002
= 2.749 + 0.001 * 502 / 6002
= 2.749

t = 1.51s, d = 6.27m:
t^2 = 1.51 * 1.51:
1.51 * 0.01 = 0.0151
1.51 * 0.50 = 0.7550
1.51 * 1.00 = 1.5100
0.0151 + 0.7550 = 0.7701
0.7701 + 1.5100 = 2.2801
k = 6.27 / 1.51^2 = 6.27 / 2.2801 = 6.270 / 2.280
= 0 + 1 * 6270 / 2280
= 1 + 1 * 3990 / 2280
= 2 + 1 * 1710 / 2280
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 17100 / 2280
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 14820 / 2280
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 12540 / 2280
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 10260 / 2280
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 7980 / 2280
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 5700 / 2280
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 3420 / 2280
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 1140 / 2280
= 2.70 + 0.01 * 11400 / 2280
= 2.71 + 0.01 * 9120 / 2280
= 2.72 + 0.01 * 6840 / 2280
= 2.73 + 0.01 * 4560 / 2280
= 2.74 + 0.01 * 2280 / 2280
= 2.75 + 0.01 * 0 / 2280
= 2.750 + 0.001 * 0 / 2280
= 2.750

t = 1.33s, d = 4.86m:
t^2 = 1.33 * 1.33:
1.33 * 0.03 = 0.0399
1.33 * 0.30 = 0.3990
1.33 * 1.00 = 1.3300
0.0399 + 0.3990 = 0.4389
0.4389 + 1.3300 = 1.7689
k = 4.86 / 1.33^2 = 4.86 / 1.7689 = 4.860 / 1.768
= 0 + 1 * 4860 / 1768
= 1 + 1 * 3092 / 1768
= 2 + 1 * 1324 / 1768
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 13240 / 1768
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 11472 / 1768
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 9704 / 1768
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 7936 / 1768
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 6168 / 1768
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 4400 / 1768
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 2632 / 1768
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 864 / 1768
= 2.70 + 0.01 * 8640 / 1768
= 2.71 + 0.01 * 6872 / 1768
= 2.72 + 0.01 * 5104 / 1768
= 2.73 + 0.01 * 3336 / 1768
= 2.74 + 0.01 * 1568 / 1768
= 2.740 + 0.001 * 15680 / 1768
= 2.741 + 0.001 * 13912 / 1768
= 2.742 + 0.001 * 12144 / 1768
= 2.743 + 0.001 * 10376 / 1768
= 2.744 + 0.001 * 8608 / 1768
= 2.745 + 0.001 * 6840 / 1768
= 2.746 + 0.001 * 5072 / 1768
= 2.747 + 0.001 * 3304 / 1768
= 2.748 + 0.001 * 1536 / 1768
= 2.748

k values: 2.748, 2.749, 2.750, 2.748
k values (sorted): 2.748, 2.748, 2.749, 2.750
The median k is 2.748.

For t = 3.95:
t^2 = 3.95 * 3.95:
3.95 * 0.05 = 0.1975
3.95 * 0.90 = 3.5550
3.95 * 3.00 = 11.8500
0.1975 + 3.5550 = 3.7525
3.7525 + 11.8500 = 15.6025
= 15.6025

d = 2.748 * 15.6025:
2.748 * 0.0005 = 0.0013740
2.748 * 0.0020 = 0.0054960
2.748 * 0.6000 = 1.6488000
2.748 * 5.0000 = 13.7400000
2.748 * 10.0000 = 27.4800000
0.0013740 + 0.0054960 = 0.0068700
0.0068700 + 1.6488000 = 1.6556700
1.6556700 + 13.7400000 = 15.3956700
15.3956700 + 27.4800000 = 42.8756700
= 42.875

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{42.875}
